name: marketing-image-ops
description: Deterministic image work for the marketing suite: detects a generic third-party image MCP (Sharp or ImageMagick based) and delegates raster primitives (resize, crop, optimize, convert), then composes marketing presets it doesn't ship — OG images (1200x630), app-store frames, favicon sets, captioned frames. MCP-agnostic; degrades to an HTML composite for framing and skips-with-note for raster when no MCP is registered. Never installs anything. Ships the image-ops skill.
